title: ProtocolLab TLS Contract Verification
scope: Verify TLS public contract structure and traceability only; do not verify an executor, TLS library, certificate system, or benchmark.
verification_method: Schema validation, fixture checks, scenario and suite reference resolution, standards-reference inspection, and repository-boundary inspection.
procedure: Validate legacy TLS profile v1 and every closed TLS profile v2 fixture.
Confirm TLS 1.2, AES-GCM, ChaCha20, and mutual-auth profile identities cannot contradict their negotiated parameters.
Confirm accepted and rejected 0-RTT use identical replay-safe input and distinct recovery checks.
Confirm KeyUpdate requires post-update proof without traffic-secret publication.
Validate all six canonical record direction/size cases and payload hashes.
Confirm diagnostic and compatibility cells are excluded from comparison aggregation.
expected_result: The bounded TLS compatibility, profile, security-diagnostic, and record-coverage contracts are internally consistent and make no executable support claim.
